name: PartnerExpoPackageOverviewCard
purpose: Displays expo package pricing, visibility, featured state, benefits, and edit entry point for assigned partner expo managers.

props.name: packages
props.description: Expo package display rows to render in overview order.

props.name: canEdit
props.description: Whether to show the edit packages action.

props.name: editHref
props.description: Partner edit URL for package updates.
